title: GTR-2025 Cloud Control Plane Attack & Defense Replay

events.detail: Compromised service principal credentials used from unusual IP
Set federation settings on domain — attacker modifies SAML signing
CreateFunction20150331 — Lambda backdoor deployed from non-IaC
CreateRole with external trust policy for persistence
RunInstances — 8x p4d.24xlarge GPU instances in af-south-1
GTR-2025 identity hunt and resource abuse alerts fire
CLAW: Federation reverted, Lambda disabled, instances terminated
SCPs deployed preventing future federation and GPU abuse
